hook: The best follow-up is warm, clear, and proportionate to what actually happened.
body: A good message confirms the tone of the date without demanding a result before the other person has had space to feel into it.

hook: Men often either disappear out of fear or send a giant emotional recap out of anxiety.
body: Keep the follow-up human and simple rather than trying to resolve the whole future that night.

hook: Keep the follow-up human and simple rather than trying to resolve the whole future that night.
body: A short note saying you enjoyed the date and would like to see her again usually does enough.

body: Send one clear follow-up that matches the actual warmth of the date, then let it breathe.
